recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Action, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang meet up with Batman and other friends to defeat evil villains and save the day.

recommendations.title: Balto: Wolf Quest
recommendations.overview: Balto and his daughter Aleu embark on a journey of adventure and self discovery.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb the Movie: Candace Against the Universe
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb travel across the galaxy to rescue their older sister Candace, who has been abducted by aliens and taken to a utopia in a far-off planet, free of her pesky little brothers.

recommendations.title: G.I. Joe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Science Fiction, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: G.I. Joe faces a new enemy as an ancient society of snake people known as Cobra-La try to forcefully take back the earth from those who drove them underground eons ago.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Alien Invaders
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Mystery, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A cosmic case of flying saucers, intergalactic intrigue and out-of-this-world romance launches Scooby-Doo! and the Mystery Inc., Gang into their most unearthly adventure ever.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time III: The Time of the Great Giving
recommendations.overview: When a sudden shortage of water threatens all life in the great valley, The gang of young dinosaur must cooperate with a group of bullies to make a risky journey outside the valley and find the cause.

recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Metropolis
recommendations.overview: In the midst of societal conflict in the futuristic city of Metropolis, Kenichi and his uncle Shunsaku Ban set out to uncover the mystery behind the first human-like robot, Tima.
